meaning: adj.无遗漏的,彻底的,详尽的,无遗的
examples: This is by no means an exhaustive list but it gives an indication of the many projects taking place.
We've performed an exhaustive scan on your computer, but we couldn't find any malicious software.
Research from the exhaustive study of groundwater from over 950 drilling logs has just been published.
After an exhaustive review, the USDA gave Roundup Ready Alfalfa the green light in 2005.
"Radio's Big Bully, " harrumphs netzine Salon.com in an exhaustive series that started in March 2001.
